description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian with a stocky build, standing with arms extended horizontally. He is dressed in a casual short-sleeve t-shirt featuring a bold graphic on the chest, paired with fitted pants that have a visible side stripe or pattern. His footwear consists of open-toed sandals, and his feet are slightly apart. The individual has short, neatly styled hair and a neutral facial expression. The clothing fits comfortably, and the overall appearance suggests a relaxed, everyday urban style. No accessories or carried objects are visible.
description: A stocky adult male in a casual t-shirt, fitted pants with side detail, and sandals, standing with arms outstretched. He has short hair and a neutral expression.
description_view_0: Front view showing the t-shirt's graphic, facial features, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, arm, and the side stripe on the pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, t-shirt, and both arms extended horizontally.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, arm, and the side detail on the pants.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeve t-shirt and fitted pants with side detail
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
